entities.name: BARNYARD MILLET

entities.description: The geographical area where the genotypes were evaluated

entities.description: A statistical method used to determine the relationship between grain yield and agro-morphological traits

entities.description: A statistical method used to determine the direct effect of traits on grain yield

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The primary yield trait used as a benchmark for correlation and path analysis

entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield

entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield

entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield

entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield

entities.name: STEM DIAMETER
entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield and showing a high direct effect

entities.name: LENGTH OF FLAG LEAF
entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield

entities.name: WIDTH OF FLAG LEAF
entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield

entities.name: LENGTH OF INFLORESCENCE
entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield

entities.name: WIDTH OF INFLORESCENCE
entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield

entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield

entities.name: NUMBER OF RACEMES
entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield

entities.name: THOUSAND GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: An agro-morphological trait positively correlated with grain yield
